author: yinshaohua
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A unified calendar view syncing events from Google Calendar, CalDAV, and ICS feeds into one beautiful interface.

manifest.author: yinsh
manifest.description: A unified calendar view syncing events from Google Calendar, CalDAV, and ICS feeds into one beautiful interface.
manifest.name: UniCalendar

name: UniCalendar

releases.author: yinshaohua
releases.description:
## UniCalendar 1.0.0

First public release.

### Features
- Unified month view aggregating Google Calendar,DAV, and ICS sources
- Chinese lunar calendar with festivals, solar terms, and public holiday overlay
- Google Calendar OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow (no server required)
- CalDAV support (Nextcloud, iCloud, Fastmail, etc.)
- ICS feed subscription
- Event deduplication across sources
- Auto-sync with configurable interval
- Mobile compatible (iOS & Android)
